title: geissolomataceae
intro: Geissolomataceae is a family of flowering plants that belongs to the taxonomical rank of family. It is a monotypic family, consisting of a single genus and its associated species. Geissolomataceae includes plants that are native to Australia and are characterized by their unique, often shrub-like growth habit. This family is part of the larger group of flowering plants, and is notable for its distinct characteristics and limited distribution.
